text.message: Not letting you settle and get port that easy
You sit there and don’t respond, then within 2 seconds go wow
Pretty simple. I have it on mobile and only opened the chat when I saw the guy that literally just said blue won the game already proceeded to rob me next chance he got
Good I’m glad that’s how you think
You say yes give me a wheat which you produce well and I block blue
You’re wild if you think that’s not the move
Please stop wasting time go quicker blue
